title: WIP - Use SSL certificates in CI tests
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Add a test to use certificates when authenticating to a Docker Registry in Travis CI.

comments.body: Not sure why this is a WIP, I would remove that and then we can work on it til you get the tests to pass.
I set it to a WIP as the tests weren't passing and it might take a bit to get them to go.  Mostly a sign for folks to not bother reviewing ATM.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 9790b89) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@TomSweeneyRedHat Are we done playing with this, Either close or fix the tests.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 7a5fee0) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably a4c56c2) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
@TomSweeneyRedHat What do you want to do?
I want to have a multitude of time so I can work on this.  Can we leave it as is?  If it really bugs you to have it hanging you can close it and I'll push it later if I ever get back to it.
@TomSweeneyRedHat No problem.  About once I month I run through all old PR's to give them a kick in the shorts.
@TomSweeneyRedHat This PR Is old and haggard can I close it?
CLosing this since got no response.
